name: No-Reply Re-engagement Drip
description: Detect contacts who haven't replied in X days, auto-enroll in a re-engagement sequence with AI-written personalized messages.

client_variables.offer_or_incentive: Optional: free resource, discount, or consultation to re-engage

setup_steps: Define no-reply threshold with client (default 7 days)
Identify CRM tags/stages that qualify for re-engagement
Set up exclusion rules (already won, do-not-contact, etc.)
Build n8n workflow: Schedule → Query CRM for stale leads → AI message → Send
Create OpenAI prompt for re-engagement email variations
Configure escalation: mark as lost after max attempts
Launch with weekly review of re-engagement rates
n8n_workflow_nodes: GHL API - Query contacts with no reply > X days
OpenAI - Generate re-engagement message (varies by attempt #)
GHL API - Update contact tag (re-engagement attempt #)
GHL API - Move to Lost stage

drip_sequence.message_type: Value-add: share relevant tip or resource
Breakup email: 'Should I close your file?' with easy reply option
